mapper.sql: pf.id, pf.plan_id, pf.frame_id, pf.plan_community_id, pf.release_date_begin, pf.release_date_end, pf.release_status
mapper.select: SELECT , p.plan_no, p.plan_name, p.customer, f.frame_no, f.building, f.unit, f.elevator FROM plan_frame pf LEFT JOIN plan p ON pf.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN frame f ON pf.frame_id = f.id WHERE pf.id = #{id}

SELECT , p.plan_no, p.plan_name, p.customer, f.frame_no, f.building, f.unit, f.elevator FROM plan_frame pf LEFT JOIN plan p ON pf.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN frame f ON pf.frame_id = f.id ORDER BY pf.id DESC

SELECT , p.plan_no, p.plan_name, p.customer, f.frame_no, f.building, f.unit, f.elevator FROM plan_frame pf LEFT JOIN plan p ON pf.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN frame f ON pf.frame_id = f.id WHERE pf.plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY pf.id DESC

SELECT , p.plan_no, p.plan_name, p.customer, f.frame_no, f.building, f.unit, f.elevator FROM plan_frame pf LEFT JOIN plan p ON pf.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN frame f ON pf.frame_id = f.id WHERE pf.frame_id = #{frameId} ORDER BY pf.id DESC

SELECT , p.plan_no, p.plan_name, p.customer, f.frame_no, f.building, f.unit, f.elevator FROM plan_frame pf LEFT JOIN plan p ON pf.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN frame f ON pf.frame_id = f.id WHERE pf.plan_community_id = #{planCommunityId} ORDER BY pf.id DESC

SELECT , p.plan_no, p.plan_name, p.customer, f.frame_no, f.building, f.unit, f.elevator FROM plan_frame pf LEFT JOIN plan p ON pf.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN frame f ON pf.frame_id = f.id WHERE pf.release_status = #{releaseStatus} ORDER BY pf.id DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO plan_frame ( plan_id, frame_id, plan_community_id, release_date_begin, release_date_end, release_status ) VALUES
(#{item.planId}, #{item.frameId}, #{item.planCommunityId}, #{item.releaseDateBegin}, #{item.releaseDateEnd}, #{item.releaseStatus})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM plan_frame WHERE id IN
#{id}
